commit.name: Weather Card
commit.description: Data display with props, design tokens, and responsive layout
commit.prompt:
Build a weather card component. It should display:
- Current temperature (large, prominent)
- Weather condition with an appropriate icon/emoji (sunny, cloudy, rainy, etc.)
- Humidity percentage
- Wind speed
- A 5-day forecast strip at the bottom showing day name, icon, and high/low temps

All data must come from props — never hardcode weather data. Use CSS variables from the design system for all colors and spacing.

issues.description: No hover or focus feedback provided for the interactive forecast days — while they use the Hoverable wrapper, there are no visual style changes (like background color or scale) implemented to indicate interactivity to the user.
issues.fix: No hover or focus feedback provided for the interactive forecast days — while they use the Hoverable wrapper, there are no visual style changes (like background color or scale) implemented to indicate interactivity to the user.

issues.description: The forecast items (Box elements) are interactive (using Hoverable) but are not focusable or operable via keyboard. Provide a role and tabIndex or make them semantic buttons.
issues.fix: The forecast items (Box elements) are interactive (using Hoverable) but are not focusable or operable via keyboard. Provide a role and tabIndex or make them semantic buttons.

issues.description: The emoji weather icons are being read by screen readers as characters or decorative. While aria-label is provided, for purely decorative icons, consider aria-hidden='true'. If they provide meaning, consider using an 'img' tag with 'alt' text.
issues.fix: The emoji weather icons are being read by screen readers as characters or decorative. While aria-label is provided, for purely decorative icons, consider aria-hidden='true'. If they provide meaning, consider using an 'img' tag with 'alt' text.

issues.description: The heading hierarchy is currently just an H1 for the city name; the '5-Day Forecast' label at line 81 should be a sub-heading (e.g., H2 or H3).
issues.fix: The heading hierarchy is currently just an H1 for the city name; the '5-Day Forecast' label at line 81 should be a sub-heading (e.g., H2 or H3).

issues.description: The humidity and wind speed values are displayed without clear semantic grouping or labels that describe the relationship between the label and the value (e.g., using a Definition List or descriptive text for screen readers).
issues.fix: The humidity and wind speed values are displayed without clear semantic grouping or labels that describe the relationship between the label and the value (e.g., using a Definition List or descriptive text for screen readers).

issues.description: In the forecast section (lines 90-93), the numeric prop `gap={0}` is used for the temperature stack instead of a design token variable.
issues.fix: In the forecast section (lines 90-93), the numeric prop `gap={0}` is used for the temperature stack instead of a design token variable.

issues.description: No empty state provided if the 'forecast' array is empty; should display a message indicating no forecast data is available.
issues.fix: No empty state provided if the 'forecast' array is empty; should display a message indicating no forecast data is available.

issues.description: Line 90: gap={0} should use var(--ggui-spacing-0) or the equivalent design token.
issues.fix: Line 90: gap={0} should use var(--ggui-spacing-0) or the equivalent design token.

evaluation.critique: The component has strong layout and design token usage with proper spacing and semantic colors throughout. Main issues: Hoverable on forecast boxes lacks visual feedback styling (no actual hover effect defined), and the refresh button's onClick performs a full page reload which is poor UX for a weather card component.
